component.name: Chovy Sign V2
Chovy Sign V2
Chovy Sign V2
component.summary: Tool to convert PSP and PS1 ISO's to be used on PSVita
An application to allow you to convert PSP and PS1 ISO's to be playable on unmodified PSVita
An application to allow you to convert PSP and PS1 ISO's to be playable on unmodified PSVita

description.p: Chovy Sign V2 is an application to allow you to convert PSP and PS1 ISO's to be playable on unmodified PSVita.
Warning: App requires a valid and working (offical) PSP or PS1 license;
Instructions to use the tool are included in the Porject's README
